ats: Oracle/Workday (UST careers — careers.ust.com); apply via LinkedIn or UST careers portal
jd_summary: Associate II - Corporate Services L&D Coordinator. Administer enterprise LMS (Saba); build/maintain digital courses, learning paths, and certifications in AppliedX/AGU; create course scripts and video transcripts; manage enrollments, groups, permissions, and content QA; generate completion/compliance/engagement reports; coordinate event (ILT) logistics and vendor management (SOWs, POs); support instructional designers and learning experience managers.
yoe_required: 3-6 years in L&D operations, training coordination, events, or comparable role
sponsorship_note: No explicit no-sponsorship / work-authorization / citizenship / ITAR language found in the LinkedIn JD. UST is a large IT-services firm that sponsors H-1B broadly. NOT verified specifically for this internal People role — treat sponsorship as UNCONFIRMED (push-forward per standing rules, not a hard stop). Comp range posted: $42K-$63K (CA).
verification: LIVE per LinkedIn (job id 4429202492). JD detail (Saba LMS, AppliedX/AGU, CA comp range) consistent with a genuine UST posting. Could not independently confirm on careers.ust.com (site connection refused / not indexed in search), but LinkedIn posting is detailed and active.
fit_note: At-level coordinator match. LMS/course-building/certification/needs-assessment/vendor scope maps directly to Jamie's InGenius program work and NextGen/Vestas training experience. Resume Skills already list LMS (Canvas, Moodle).
concern: Heavy on specific-platform tooling (Saba, AppliedX/AGU, Articulate 360) Jamie hasn't used by name; her LMS experience is Canvas/Moodle. On-site Santa Clara (relocation framing). Low comp band for a sponsored role.
